# BlogWriter

## Description
Automated blog post generator using Streamlit, LangChain, Mistral AI, and DuckDuckGo web search.

## Tech Stack
Python 3.11, Streamlit, Mistral Large, LangChain, DuckDuckGo Search

## Core Files
- agent.py: Single-file Streamlit app — DuckDuckGo search → Mistral prompt → blog output

## Key Patterns
- Sequential chain: RunnableLambda(web_search_node) | prompt | llm
- web_search_node invokes DuckDuckGoSearchRun with user topic
- Blog prompt with strict 400-word limit, temperature 0.9
- Token safety: max_tokens=1000

## Entry Point
streamlit run agent.py

## API Keys (.env)
MISTRAL_API_KEY
